title: OpenClaw 病毒式传播，暴露 12 类严重漏洞；
description: 过去的大型模型安全研究主要集中在语言级风险，例如提示注入。
titleZh: OpenClaw 病毒式传播，暴露 12 类严重漏洞；
titleEn: OpenClaw Goes Viral, Exposing 12 Types of Critical Vulnerabilities; MCP Protocol Security Benchmark Released
descriptionZh: 过去的大型模型安全研究主要集中在语言级风险，例如提示注入。
descriptionEn: Past large model security research primarily focused on language-level risks like prompt injection. However, MSB indicates that as AI calls tools and interacts with real-world systems, the attack surface is expanding from the text space to the tool ecosystem. As Agents gradually become the new paradigm for AI applications, security may be turning into a crucial threshold that must be crossed in this technological leap.
